category_sources: source_facts.description: Rules engine for cloud security, cost optimization, and governance; official Cloud Custodian docs describe the project documentation for c7n tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is c7n, but source_facts.repo and official documentation brand the project as Cloud Custodian.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted at cloudcustodian.io/docs; source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository with README documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists cloud security, cost optimization, and governance; source_facts.executables lists custodian.
